x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: VA catalog integration enables Now Assist to guide employees through service requests within conversations. Without catalog integration, AI cannot complete fulfillment.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("sys_cs_topic");gr.addQuery("active",true);gr.addQuery("published",true);gr.addEncodedQuery("descriptionLIKEcatalog^ORdescriptionLIKErequest");gr.query();var catTopics=gr.getRowCount();return{status:catTopics>=10?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:catTopics+" catalog-connected VA topics",finding:catTopics<10?"Only "+catTopics+" catalog-connected VA topics. Now Assist AI-guided fulfillment requires catalog integration for service request completion.":catTopics+" catalog-connected topics -- Now Assist can guide employees through AI-assisted service fulfillment."};})()
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Connect VA topics to catalog items via Catalog task topic blocks. Test end-to-end catalog fulfillment in VA.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_03f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c55
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[VA catalog integration enables Now Assist to guide employees through service requests within conversations. Without catalog integration, AI cannot complete fulfillment.]]></ai_justification><check_name>VA Catalog Integration</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("sys_cs_topic");gr.addQuery("active",true);gr.addQuery("published",true);gr.addEncodedQuery("descriptionLIKEcatalog^ORdescriptionLIKErequest");gr.query();var catTopics=gr.getRowCount();return{status:catTopics>=10?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:catTopics+" catalog-connected VA topics",finding:catTopics<10?"Only "+catTopics+" catalog-connected VA topics. Now Assist AI-guided fulfillment requires catalog integration for service request completion.":catTopics+" catalog-connected topics -- Now Assist can guide employees through AI-assisted service fulfillment."};})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>VIRTUAL_AGENT</module><number>CHK0000511</number><order>110</order><remediation_guidance>Connect VA topics to catalog items via Catalog task topic blocks. Test end-to-end catalog fulfillment in VA.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>03f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c55</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>VA Catalog Integration</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_03f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c55</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
